questions.question: 1. Crankshafts can also be machined out of a billet, often using a bar of high quality vacuum remelted steel:

explanations.a: Incorrect. Drilling is only a single operation and does not represent the full manufacturing method.
explanations.b: Correct. Crankshafts can be produced from a billet using machining processes.
explanations.c: Incorrect. Metal working is a broad term, not the specific process referred to here.
explanations.d: Incorrect. One of the given options is correct.

questions.question: 2. Which material is used in the simulation of crankshaft for making crankshaft:

explanations.a: Correct. C-35 medium carbon steel is suitable for crankshaft manufacturing due to its strength and toughness.
explanations.b: Incorrect. Alnico is a magnetic alloy and not used for crankshaft production.
explanations.c: Incorrect. Only C-35 is appropriate in this simulation.
explanations.d: Incorrect. One of the options listed is correct.

questions.question: 3. The temperature of the billet at the starting of impression die forging in the simulation is:

explanations.a: Correct. Impression die forging of steel typically begins around 1100°C to ensure sufficient ductility.
explanations.b: Incorrect. 400°C is too low for hot forging steel.
explanations.c: Incorrect. 30°C is room temperature and unsuitable for hot forging.
explanations.d: Incorrect. One of the provided options is correct.

questions.question: 4. The configuration and number of pistons in relation to each other and the crank leads to straight, V or _________:

explanations.a: Incorrect. Flat-six is a specific example of a flat engine configuration.
explanations.b: Incorrect. VS Engine is not a recognized standard configuration.
explanations.c: Correct. Common engine configurations include straight, V, and flat engines.
explanations.d: Incorrect. One of the options listed is correct.

questions.question: 5. For some engines it is necessary to provide counterweights for the reciprocating mass of each piston and connecting rod to improve ________:

explanations.a: Incorrect. Counterweights do not determine engine configuration.
explanations.b: Correct. Counterweights are used to improve engine balance and reduce vibrations.
explanations.c: Incorrect. Dead centre refers to piston position, not balancing.
explanations.d: Incorrect. Counterweights improve balance, not engine type.
